_comment_: ECS Fargate task definition for rpt-worker. Replace every <PLACEHOLDER> before registering. Register with: aws ecs register-task-definition --cli-input-json file://ecs/worker-task-definition.json
_comment_executionRoleArn: Pulls the image from ECR and reads secrets from Secrets Manager / SSM. Create once: AmazonECSTaskExecutionRolePolicy + a custom inline policy granting secretsmanager:GetSecretValue on the two secret ARNs below.
_comment_taskRoleArn: Optional — only needed if the worker itself calls AWS APIs. The current worker only makes outbound HTTPS to the Amplify URL, so this can be omitted or left as a minimal role.

containerDefinitions.name: worker
containerDefinitions._comment_stopTimeout: Must be >= SHUTDOWN_TIMEOUT_MS (default 20s) so SIGTERM has time to drain in-flight ticks before SIGKILL.
containerDefinitions._comment_resourceLimits: Worker uses single-digit-MB RAM and ~0% CPU between ticks. 256/512 is the smallest Fargate slice and is generous.
containerDefinitions._comment_readonlyRootFilesystem: Defense-in-depth: the worker writes nothing to disk, so the FS can be read-only.
containerDefinitions._comment_user: node user is baked into the image (USER node in Dockerfile). Don't override.
